title: Two New Interviews with Anno
wikitext:
[]: Two New Interviews with Anno             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Dec 23, 2009 5:45 am According to Anno's blog, Toei Animation Archives recently published an interview with him . Not only that, a televised interview either already has been or will soon be broadcast. Between the two of these interviews, I'm sure we're bound to find something interesting and meaningful-- that is, if we actually get these interviews located and translated, which I'm sure we won't.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Dec 24, 2009 12:53 am BUMP justice

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Dec 24, 2009 7:00 am EvaCub wrote: BUMP

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Dec 24, 2009 10:32 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: EvaCub wrote: BUMP

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Dec 24, 2009 11:19 am Nice! It'd be good if these could be translated, but how many have there been already that we'll probably never see? :\ edit: impulsive want of people stop editing my posts

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Dec 24, 2009 7:45 pm I also hope these get translated. I’d really like to know where Anno plans on taking Rebuild from here on out.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Dec 25, 2009 9:32 am I sent the link to my friend in Japan asking if he's seen it or if he can record it. He said "Japanese Eiga Senmon Channeru, sounds like satellite, and they're playing from kind of Japanese Roman Porno feature".

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Jan 05, 2010 6:52 pm Ornette wrote: I sent the link to my friend in Japan asking if he's seen it or if he can record it. He said "Japanese Eiga Senmon Channeru, sounds like satellite, and they're playing from kind of Japanese Roman Porno feature".

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 05, 2010 7:59 pm He can't, because he doesn't have satellite.

[]:             Quote Post by Enki v.2 » Mon Feb 22, 2010 2:54 pm Ornette wrote: Japanese Roman Porno feature

chunks.content:
Article: Two New Interviews with Anno
[]: Two New Interviews with Anno             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Dec 23, 2009 5:45 am According to Anno's blog, Toei Animation Archives recently published an interview with him . Not only that, a televised interview either already has been or will soon be broadcast. Between the two of these interviews, I'm sure we're bound to find something interesting and meaningful-- that is, if we actually get these interviews located and translated, which I'm sure we won't.
